title: Harbour Heights
subtitle: Luxury residential tower, Bahrain Bay
description: Harbour Heights is a landmark 35-storey residential tower positioned on the waterfront of Bahrain Bay. ASK Real Estate was appointed as the exclusive leasing and property management partner for the entire development, overseeing 180 luxury apartments ranging from studios to four-bedroom penthouses. The tower offers panoramic views of the Arabian Gulf and stands as one of Bahrain Bay's most recognisable addresses. ASK's mandate covers full Owners' Association administration, resident services, and ongoing facility management.

title: Harbour View
subtitle: Waterfront residential towers, Bahrain Bay
description: Harbour View is a premium waterfront residential development in Bahrain Bay comprising 120 apartments across two interconnected towers. ASK Real Estate manages the full Owners' Association setup under RERA regulations and delivers ongoing facility management services for all common areas. The short-term hospitality lettings programme for the furnished residential floors is operated directly by the ASK team, ensuring consistent returns for investors. The project reflects ASK's capability to manage complex multi-tower communities end-to-end.

title: Harbour Row
subtitle: Luxury townhouses, Bahrain Bay
description: Harbour Row is a collection of 45 luxury townhouses situated along the waterfront promenade of Bahrain Bay, each finished to a premium specification with private terraces and direct marina access. ASK Real Estate was retained as the exclusive sales and leasing agent for both off-plan and completed units, leveraging its regional investor network and HNW client database. The mandate also encompasses ongoing property management and resident services post-handover. Harbour Row represents one of ASK's standout residential sales mandates in Bahrain Bay.

title: Curv Mall
subtitle: Retail and F&B destination, Busaiteen
description: Curv Mall is a contemporary retail and dining destination spanning 64 commercial units across three levels in Busaiteen. ASK Real Estate holds the commercial leasing mandate and manages the Owners' Association and facility services for all common areas. The centre hosts a curated mix of international F&B brands, lifestyle retail, and medical clinics, positioning it as a neighbourhood anchor. ASK's active tenant-curation approach ensures occupancy levels remain consistently above market benchmarks.

title: Meliá Residences
subtitle: Branded hotel residences, Seef
description: Meliá Residences is a branded hospitality and residential development in the Seef district, operated in partnership with the international Meliá Hotels brand. ASK Real Estate manages 96 fully furnished hotel-branded apartments on behalf of individual unit owners, running the short-stay lettings programme and distributing rental returns on a monthly basis. The mandate spans property management, guest services coordination, and liaison with the hotel operator. This project demonstrates ASK's expertise in the specialist hospitality asset class.

title: GFH Financial Square
subtitle: Mixed-use towers, Bahrain Harbour
description: GFH Financial Square is a landmark mixed-use development at Bahrain Harbour comprising over 300 residential, commercial, and office units across two towers. ASK Real Estate serves as the property and facilities management partner, overseeing day-to-day operations, Owners' Association governance under RERA, and the residential leasing programme. The development sits within the same complex as ASK's own headquarters at GFH Tower, underscoring the firm's deep integration with this premier address. As the project's ongoing manager, ASK is responsible for maintaining asset value and service quality across the full portfolio.
